prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约18507→20380→23353→23055→26287名，整体呈持续后移趋势（位次数字增大），近3年累计后移约5934名，2025年较2024年后 移约3232名，后移速度加快；该校在河北省物理类招生计划：2021年97人、2022年94人、2023年97人、2024年113人、2025年115人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划 128人，较2025年增加13人（+11.3%），扩招幅度明显，理论上使竞争略有缓解，但位次数字仍可能因其他因素后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中 国大学排名2026年第75名（2021年第63名→2022年第70名→2023年第71名→2024年第74名→2025年第75名），排名近年略有下滑但基本稳定在70–75区间；声誉文件 中未出现该校相关舆情事件，抖音学校热度总排名中亦未进入前106名，整体关注度一般，无明显正面或负面信号。投档异常文件中无该校断档记录，报考心理较为平稳。该校以地质、资源、环境为特色，相关学科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐），该校物理类招生涵盖上述热门专业，对考生有一定吸引力；河北省2026年普 通高考总人数约60.98万，物理类按近年占比约59.8%估算约36.5万人，较2025年物理类36.3万人略有增加，竞争加剧；省控线方面，河北物理类本科批2025年459分、2024年448分 ，呈上升趋势，反映整体竞争强度提升；该校位于北京，对河北考生具有较强地域吸引力；2025年在河北省招生占比约3.01%（18人/598人），属外省招生中占 比中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类计划扩招11.3%缓解部分竞争压力、河北省考生总数小幅增加加剧竞争、学校声誉平稳无异常信号 、热门工科专业持续吸引考生等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年26287名基础上继续后移，预测最低位次约28270名，区间27770–28770名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18507 → 20380 → 23353 → 23055 → 26287, showing a continuous backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 5934 positions in the last 3 years, and a backward shift of about 3232 positions in 2025 compared to 2024, accelerating the backward movement; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category: 97 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 113 in 2024, 115 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 128, an increase of 13 (+11.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion rate, theoretically easing competition slightly, but ranking numbers may still shift backward due to other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 ranked 75th (2021: 63rd → 2022: 70th → 2023: 71st → 2024: 74th → 2025: 75th), with rankings slightly declining in recent years but generally stable in the 70–75 range; no related public opinion incidents appeared in the reputation file, and the university did not enter the top 106 in Douyin school popularity rankings, with overall attention being average, without significant positive or negative signals. No record of score gaps in the admission anomaly file, indicating stable application psychology. The university is characterized by geology, resources, and environment, with strong related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have consistently high social popularity (all highly recommended in 2024), and the university's Physics Category enrollment includes these popular majors, attracting some candidates; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, with Physics Category estimated at about 365,000 based on the recent proportion of about 59.8%, a slight increase from 363,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; regarding provincial control lines, Hebei Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 459 points, in 2024 was 448 points, showing an upward trend, reflecting increased overall competition intensity; the university is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Hebei candidates; in 2025, the enrollment proportion in Hebei Province was about 3.01% (18 people/598 people), which is moderately high among out-of-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 11.3% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 easing some competitive pressure, the slight increase in total candidates in Hebei Province intensifying competition, the stable reputation without abnormal signals, and the sustained attraction of popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 26287, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 28270, in the range of 27770–28770.
